states.name: MoveTo(λ_target0())
states.description: My teammate is blocked, so I'll overlap to create a passing option for him.

states.name: StopAndReceiveBall()
states.description: Now I'll wait for my teammate to pass me the ball.

states.name: Pass(teammate)
states.description: The opponent is close. I will wait for a clear path and pass back to my teammate.

states.name: Shoot(goal)
states.description: I have space and a clear shot at the goal, so I will take it.

transitions.description: Now I'll wait for my teammate to pass me the ball.
